result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: Indeterminate
JUSTIFICATION: The problem description provides the objective (maximize the sum of board entries modulo 998244353 using up to 81 3x3 stamps on a 9x9 board) but fails to provide the actual input data, specifically the initial values of the 9x9 board and the specific values/weights added by the stamps. Without these values, the sum cannot be calculated.
